evidence: We continually evaluate which steps in the manufacturing process would benefit from automation and how automated manufacturing processes can improve productivity and reduce manufacturing costs.
we anticipate that digital transformation, including the AI data-cycle, will drive improved market conditions in the long term
HDDs occupy a unique place in the market by providing an economical means to create, store and utilize an increasing amount of data in the age of AI.
Cloud revenue increased by 65% in 2025 compared to 2024, primarily driven by a 36% increase in units sold... driven by higher shipments of our high-capacity enterprise products.
The increase in computing complexity and advancements in AI, along with growth in cloud computing applications... is driving rapid growth in the volume of digital content to be stored

as AI capabilities continue to evolve... we may face increasingly sophisticated cyberattacks that leverage AI technologies. These may include highly convincing phishing or social engineering attacks that use AI-generated deepfakes

the AI technologies that we employ for business purposes may be vulnerable to prompt-injection or other adversarial attacks, which could result in unauthorized access to or leakage of sensitive information.
Our use of AI technology may create new privacy and security risks, especially where personal data is involved. The use of AI may raise ethical concerns, lead to flawed outcomes

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-attributable investment amounts, R&D spend, or dedicated AI programs disclosed in the excerpts. WDC positions itself as a beneficiary/enabler of AI demand (HDD storage for data centers) rather than an AI builder or significant AI buyer; generic automation references do not constitute named AI investment programs.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases are framed as market opportunity for HDD storage demand rather than deployed AI products or internal AI initiatives with metrics. Revenue growth figures relate to cloud/enterprise HDD shipments broadly, not AI-specific deployments.
capex_mentions: No dollar amounts tied specifically to AI-attributable investment found in the excerpts.
